title: Mohandar fort
tagline: Mohandar fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Mohandar Fort / Shidaka fort is a fort located 55 km from Nashik, in Nashik district, of Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Mohandar Fort / Shidaka fort is a fort located 55 km from Nashik, in Nashik district, of Maharashtra, India. This fort is an important fort in Nashik district. The three forts Achala, Ahivant, and Mohandar are very close by. This fort was constructed to guard the Ahivant fort.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nanduri Dam
topPlaces.description: Nanduri Dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on Tapti river near Ama Local Nallaher, Nashik district in the state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Ahivant Fort
topPlaces.description: Ahivant Fort is a fort located 55km from Nashik, in Nashik district, of Maharashtra. This fort is an important fort in Nashik district.

topPlaces.name: Abhona
topPlaces.description: Abhona is a village in Kalwan tehsil of Nashik district in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It belongs to the North Maharashtra region.

topPlaces.name: Satmala Range
topPlaces.description: Satmala (pronunciation:[sɐtmaːla]) is a mountain range which runs across Nashik District, Maharashtra. They are an integral part of the Sahyadris range within Nashik.

topPlaces.name: Saptashrungi
topPlaces.description: Saptashrungi or Saptashringi (Marathi: सप्तशृङ्गि, Saptaśr̥ṇgī) is a site of Hindu pilgrimage in the village of Vani, situated 60 kilometres (37 mi) from Nashik in Indian state of Maharashtra. According to Hindu traditions, the goddess Saptashrungi Nivasini dwells within the seven mountain peaks.

topPlaces.name: Chankapur Dam
topPlaces.description: Chankapur Dam, is an earthfill dam on the Girna River near Abhona in Kalwan tehsil of Nashik district in the state of Maharashtra in India. The dam were built in 19th century by British.

topPlaces.name: Achala Fort
topPlaces.description: Achala Fort is a westernmost fort in the Satmala hill range. It is located 55 km from Nashik, in Nashik district, of Maharashtra.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mohandar fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mohandar fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mohandar fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (98 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mohandar fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mohandar fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mohandar fort?
faq.a: Stays in Mohandar fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mohandar fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nanduri Dam, Ahivant Fort, Abhona, Satmala Range, Saptashrungi.
